scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('dist/worker.js','pages-dist/_worker.js')" && wrangler pages deploy pages-dist --project-name sub-store --branch main --no-bundle
scripts.prepush: node -e "let f=require('fs'),t=f.readFileSync('wrangler.toml','utf8');if(!t.includes('你的KV命名空间ID')){console.error('\x1b[31m请先清除 wrangler.toml 中的 KV ID!\x1b[0m');process.exit(1)}"
